title: Signal Space UI
subtitle: A dashboard experience for monitoring cultural programming.
description: A quiet operational interface for teams managing event calendars, audience signals, and partner updates across multiple venues.

blocks.text: The product had to support daily scanning, quick status changes, and deeper review without turning every screen into a dense control room.

blocks.alt: Signal Space dashboard overview with event columns and metrics
blocks.caption: Dashboard overview with collapsible signal groups.

blocks.quote: The interface should feel like a reliable desk, not a command center.

steps.title: Workflow Mapping
steps.description: Separated daily scheduling tasks from weekly reporting moments to reduce competing priorities on the same view.

steps.title: Component Pass
steps.description: Designed compact controls, table states, and semantic color use for clear repeated action.

steps.title: Prototype Review
steps.description: Tested navigation and density with producers who moved between desktop planning and mobile checks.

items.label: Primary flows
items.description: Scheduling, review, publishing, reporting, and partner updates.

items.label: Reusable components
items.description: Controls, cells, cards, overlays, and empty states.

items.label: Prototype screens
items.description: Desktop and mobile states for stakeholder review.
